spec_match.rationale: The validator now generates migrate_to, migrate_from, and web-app-origin-association snippets with allow_migration instead of the stale origin_migration shape.

interactive.rationale: Sample buttons, manual inputs, validation, and generated snippets are all updated by runtime script.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now matches the manifest-incubations framing around same-site validation and old-origin authorization.

edge_cases.rationale: The page exposes invalid URLs, scheme mismatch, cross-site pairs, identical origins, and HTTP origins as visible failure states.

references.rationale: The references section cites chromestatus.com/feature/5123349239955456 and the WICG origin migration spec section.

design_system.rationale: Button background overrides include colors, verdict text no longer matches its background, and the touched styles use design-system variables.

summary: Stale reference and design-system findings resolved while keeping the concept interactive.
